name: Hot Buttered Rum Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, butter, honey, vanilla extract, rum extract, cinnamon, allspice, and nutmeg.
2. Beat the mixture with an electric mixer at medium speed until smooth and well combined.
3. Transfer the mixture to a jar with a tight-fitting lid.
4. Store in the refrigerator for up to 3 months.
5. To make larger amounts, simply multiply the ingredient quantities accordingly.
YIELD: about 3 cups (12 servings)
For One Serving:
1 cup hot water
1 jigger of rum
1 teaspoon Hot Buttered Rum Mix
Combine the hot water and rum in a mug or glass. Stir in about 1 teaspoon of the mix until dissolved.
To make a non-alcoholic drink, stir approximately 1 teaspoon of the mix into other hot beverages such as apple juice, hot milk, hot milk mixed with coffee, or plain coffee or tea.
